zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward FitzEustace於1381年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達卡斯特勒馬丁時，他的父親Roland FitzEustace26歲，母親Matilda O’Brien21歲。他於1415年之前與Alicia在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1430年在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達被列為high sheriff。他去世於1454年10月25日在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達吉爾倫享年73歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達吉爾倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward FitzEustace于1381年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達卡斯特勒馬丁时，他的父亲Roland FitzEustace26岁，母亲Matilda O’Brien21岁。他于1415年之前与Alicia在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1430年在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達被列为high sheriff。他去世于1454年10月25日在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達吉爾倫享年73岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達吉爾倫。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward FitzEustace was born in 1381, in Castlemartin, County Kildare, Ireland, his father, Roland FitzEustace, was 26 and his mother, Matilda O’Brien, was 21. He married Alicia before 1415, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1430, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Kildare, County Kildare, Ireland. He died on 25 October 1454, in Kilcullen, County Kildare, Ireland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Kilcullen, County Kildare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward FitzEustace est né en 1381, à Castlemartin, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Roland FitzEustace, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Matilda O’Brien, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alicia avant 1415, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1430, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Kildare, County Kildare, Irlande. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1454, à Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irlande, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward FitzEustace 1381 in Castlemartin, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roland FitzEustace 26 und seine Mutter Matilda O’Brien 21. Er hat vor 1415 in Irland Alicia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1430, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff in Kildare, County Kildare, Irland aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1454 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irland und wurde in Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward FitzEustace è nato il nel 1381 nel Castlemartin, County Kildare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Roland FitzEustace, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Matilda O’Brien, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Alicia prima del 1415, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1430, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda. Morì il 25 ottobre 1454, nel Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irlanda, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irlanda.

ja.County Kildare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ キルダア

ja.Castlemartin, County Kildare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ キルダアカストレマルティン
ja.Castlemartin, Kildare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ キルダアカストレマルティン
ja.Westmeath, Meath, Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドレインスターディオセゼ オフ メアス
ja.Kildare, County Kildare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルダア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward FitzEustaceが1381年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアカストレマルティンで生まれた時，父Roland FitzEustaceは26歳，母Matilda O’Brienは21歳であった。1415年以前にアイルランドでAliciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1430年，49歳の時，アイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルダアでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1454年10月25日にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルクウレンで73歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルクウレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward FitzEustace(이)가 1381년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 카스틀레마틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roland FitzEustace(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda O’Brien(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1415년 이전 아일랜드에서 Alicia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1430년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1454년 10월 25일 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬컬렌에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬컬렌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward FitzEustace nasceu em 1381, em Castlemartin, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Roland FitzEustace, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Matilda O’Brien, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Alicia antes 1415, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1430, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1454, em Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irlanda, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward FitzEustace родился в 1381 г. в местности кастлемартинь, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Roland FitzEustace было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda O’Brien, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia перед 1415 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1430 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности каилдар, коунти каилдар, Ирландия. Он умер 25 октября 1454 г. в местности килкуллен, коунти каилдар, Ирландия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности килкуллен, коунти каилдар, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward FitzEustace nació en 1381, en Castlemartin, County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Roland FitzEustace, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Matilda O’Brien, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alicia antes de 1415, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1430, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1454, en Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irlanda, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Kilcullen, County Kildare, Irlanda.
